message:
test(renderers): add 20 property-based tests for output renderers (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Cover serde roundtrips for AnalyticsSummaryData (f64 tolerance),
RuleListItem, RuleTestMatch (confidence as number), RuleDetail (anchors
array, optional field null/string), and HealthDiagnosticStatus equality
properties (reflexive, symmetric, copy, 4 distinct variants).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
